title: Check-in Hotel
opening: Selamat datang di Hotel Indah! Ada yang bisa saya bantu?

t1.prompt: Selamat datang di Hotel Indah! Ada yang bisa saya bantu?
t1.promptTranslation: Seh-lah-maht dah-tahng dee Hoh-tehl In-dah! Ah-dah yahng bee-sah sah-yah bahn-too? — Welcome to Hotel Indah! How can I help you?

t2.promptTranslation: Bah-ik. Ah-tahs nah-mah see-ah-pah reh-sehr-vah-see-nyah? — Okay. Under what name is the reservation?

t3.prompt: Terima kasih. Mohon tunjukkan kartu identitas dan metode pembayaran Anda.
t3.promptTranslation: Teh-ree-mah kah-seeh. Moh-hon toon-jook-kahn kahr-too ee-dehn-tee-tahs dahn meh-toh-deh pehm-bah-yah-rahn Ahn-dah. — Thank you. Please show your ID and payment method.

t4.prompt: Baik. Apakah Anda ada preferensi kamar, misalnya tidak merokok atau dengan pemandangan? Dan apakah termasuk sarapan?
t4.promptTranslation: Bah-ik. Ah-pah-kah Ahn-dah ah-dah preh-feh-rehn-see kah-mahr, mee-sah-nyah tee-dahk meh-roh-kohk ah-tau deh-ngahn peh-mahn-dah-ngahn? Dahn ah-pah-kah tehr-mah-sook sah-rah-pahn? — Okay. Do you have any room preferences, for example, non-smoking or with a view? And is breakfast included?

t5.prompt: Semua sudah siap. Sarapan sudah termasuk. Ini kunci kamar Anda, kamar 305. Selamat menikmati!
t5.promptTranslation: Seh-moo-ah soo-dah see-ahp. Sah-rah-pahn soo-dah tehr-mah-sook. Ee-nee koon-chee kah-mahr Ahn-dah, kah-mahr tee-gah-noh-leem-ah. Seh-lah-maht meh-neek-mah-tee! — Everything is ready. Breakfast is included. Here is your room key, room 305. Enjoy your stay!

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, bisa diulang? Saya kurang mengerti.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Mah-ahf, bee-sah dee-oo-lahng? Sah-yah koo-rahng mehn-gehr-tee. — Sorry, can you repeat? I don't quite understand.
